description_long: This is a rectangular wall-mounted mirror with a medium-width wooden frame, finished in a warm brown tone. The frame has a simple, slightly beveled design with visible wood grain texture, giving it a rustic yet classic appearance. Two small metal hanging loops are attached at the top corners, indicating it is designed to be suspended from a wall. The mirror surface itself is dark and highly reflective, occupying most of the frame's interior. The overall construction appears sturdy, with the frame providing both structural support and decorative appeal. This type of mirror would be suitable for both indoor and sheltered outdoor urban environments.
description: A rectangular wall-hanging mirror with a brown wooden frame and metal hanging loops, featuring a dark, highly reflective surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular mirror surface, wooden frame, and two metal hanging loops at the top.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the thinness of the mirror and frame, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear or alternate front view, nearly identical to view 0, showing the mirror surface and frame with hanging loops.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the slim profile of the mirror and frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, medium-width wooden frame with visible grain and a simple, slightly beveled edge; warm brown color with metal hanging loops.
